[{"Name":"Akash Rajput","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtUKiGQ2Hw1Z1M7QyJbyLrMMZm1WM76dSYnX4tWvcfqxbJMtg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I ordered food through the scanner on the table, I ordered my meal than I was waiting for 40 to 45 min for my order, I asked staff to take this order number as ordered 45 min ago and not received she said she will get the order in 5min. I again waited for 30 min no one came, I asked another staff and explained that I ordered through this scanner and already paid for it where is my order he replied I will get In 5 min, I again waited for 20 min no one came.. I asked that same person again where is my oder he replied sir you have to come downstairs to counter as they are not able to find the order in system. I had to downstairs and asked them to place my order, guy on the other side of counter said he asked his staff 1 hr back to take this order for customer but missed it. This is not happened only with me, there were 2-4 people more who faced the same issue. What is the purpose of putting scanners on table when it doesn't work. Poor service","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMKwxSNhRsqdc5tOtJ-mKcxgxcEEExZZk-WXSSr&fid=0x0:0x47002981e6e214f4"],"When":"2024-8-2"},{"Name":"Sohit Chaudhary","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAXPnMZnWDZLZLngfXvefVzrTiGOWrzUfP2veL3PJn0OQKW5qm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"ThisBurger King outlet at Millennium City centre Metro.
Tastes great always like Burger King. The best part is, they give order on the spot. You don't have to wait for your token number. Also it's quite spacious. It has sitting on first floor. Despite the crowd of metro station, people are able to find the place for sitting and eat the food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOzMElFqxZ8SuZG9qx9yNnh1TghUKM3K9SfJd0K&fid=0x0:0x47002981e6e214f4"],"When":"2024-2-20"},{"Name":"Monika Mehndiratta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwRgOWJ24_kj6vxWN5qi7-ZHUryz0IYJ_SrjwW_QlroTzvVz0GIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently visited Burger King and ordered the Veg Makhani Burger, Veg Burger Meal, and large fries. Overall, the quantity served was quite generous, especially considering the affordable pricing—definitely a great option for everyone.

The atmosphere at the outlet was nice and cozy, and the staff were well-behaved and polite, which added to a pleasant dining experience.

However, I did have some issues with the burgers. The Veg Burger lacked proper sauce, making it somewhat dry and less flavorful. The Veg Makhani Burger was particularly disappointing; the sauce did not taste like authentic makhani sauce. Instead, it had an unpleasant sour flavor, reminiscent of dal makhani, which did not complement the burger at all and the large Fries were over salty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMxUCcddLQYn_uPSr1s1UpLXQWZPg5loEUicKP7&fid=0x0:0x47002981e6e214f4"],"When":"2024-7-3"},{"Name":"Mehul Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWRdobt-6B10X5sYVgyGM4IA0q_xZqG8-Ph0JJdx4Oz4LQjX5Xvg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I would say useless but it's too good of a word.

How not to have a customer service
1. Don't have any way for customer to reach out
2. Make a chat options which is just selections
3. Don't even create option of food not delivered
4. Raise a ticket but say will contact in 24 hours

I ordered food not soap...

I guess, there is always the good old trusted Mcdonalds","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Guide","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXmApBMwfjS00hvkSidVGlBSR7z7VqGiq6_QGZ7J8MHckTK8X895g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved their combo, great value of money.

[{"Name":"Subrata Rakshit","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXljqWvuOY0BV7GFVuwLBpHEaBXEP74HVVJbKM1yxEOAcE289Y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good to have BK on the way to boarding gates. Standard BK menu, at reasonable prices. Cramped for space, so poor ambience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOmyimQUMppXbsVKGjgdTPuwQsjyWiSu57TFItA&fid=0x0:0x386fd6559b34160b"],"When":"2024-10-24"},{"Name":"Asmatullah Haroon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX16LcE3RKl7uZ24q3GffYmNhxp1Cb3P13X8g0e4sISWccjEVfc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered a burger, but they gave me something else. When I asked them to correct it, they refused to exchange it. To make things worse, their behavior towards customers was rude and insulting. I’ve attached proof showing the staff and the counter for reference.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOB2CwmTd_IhPK3_TLBkJvpBbkxIUFr_17W7hmj&fid=0x0:0x386fd6559b34160b"],"When":"2024-11-27"},{"Name":"DINESHARMA","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAhRHJNNIXfNNo1cBdqT05EqGVSJ9hrlWm0nxuKBnOClMHOMX-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The burger King is now at Indira Gandhi international airport. There are many food outlets in the vicinity but what to go for burger King is that in this category along with offering good quality meal there is very good service they offer and behaviour is quite polite in its category.
I have been here for the first time while being in delhi airport but they are good and doing well. There is no crowd and people which makes it disturbance free and quite place to have a quick and tasty bite.
While in my earlier visit to indira Gandhi international airport I have my meal at other outlets which included delli streat and MacDonald etc. But I found delli streat quite cumbersome as they were accepting payment and treat you nicely till they got order and payment once you done with that it's interesting to see their behaviour. They see and treat as if foreign object.
I have ordered for a paneer meal. However in burger King also there is improvement towards sauce and hotness of the meal. It was not so hot and sauce was like road side same of no betterment with respect that of it's taste and its intensity. It is plain. Otherwise they are good.
You can avail more offers by ordering through hoi app. And it's near to gate number 27/ 28 departure gate.
Burger King making it's presence in its category with good stuff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMkYaBN2cdZvV0958QTyVYAlyftujUJGGuuZCXT&fid=0x0:0x386fd6559b34160b"],"When":"2022-1-9"},{"Name":"Mukesh Khanayat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXx09QpPwFbfxlW7xaA4NoMPLx3cTu5ZyNCfDWB5aNDpKUyHJeb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of dining at Burger King in Terminal 3, and I must say, it was a delightful experience from start to finish. The ambiance was inviting, the service was prompt and friendly, and most importantly, the food was absolutely delicious.

I opted for their signature Whopper burger, and it exceeded my expectations in every way. The patty was juicy and flavorful, the toppings were fresh, and the bun was perfectly toasted. Each bite was a burst of savory goodness that left me craving more.

Apart from the burger, I also tried their crispy fries, which were cooked to golden perfection and seasoned just right. To complement my meal, I indulged in their refreshing beverages, which were a perfect balance of sweetness and fizz.

Overall, Burger King at Terminal 3 not only satisfied my hunger but also left me impressed with their quality, taste, and attention to detail. Whether you're a traveler passing through or a local looking for a tasty treat, I highly recommend stopping by Burger King for a truly satisfying dining experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"debasish tripathy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYE-DFM6q5U4VFXv8ps-pKjxtV4Dfdz3r0ZnKtYRbHmnDa1milcA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They stalled us for around 20 minutes claiming the item was being prepared freshly, and then came to us saying it is out of stock would you like something else. We requested a refund after a long wait for absolutely nothing and they proceeded to underpay us which we had to double check before going back and asking for the true value we paid. Horrible service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dr. Rohit Gera","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxNpEMlTHM7BK0El0IZ7ZrwOtlBq3zPhBPARUTmAfqvHOTb5U6wg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Taste is not as other outlets. Burger sour in taste don't know how old they are using should not visit","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ShAhul ShAn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLKAfk09qnbgZsfcPFaj7vi5AYI255e_hJsHzARW4uu_-0DzTI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Ordered chicken wings 4 pcs . - Limited parking facility
- Huge space inside.
- Ambience is nice and premium.
- Clean washroom
- Polite Employees

[{"Name":"Ashish kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-M7DhriEP8BrQ_l9JpWWIeicYZrTo5hnYEP4atW2ohkhKEWQS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall experience was amazing
Nearest to the blue line rajouri garden metro station.
This is my go to place to order burgers because they deliver very quickly and my kid loves their chicken cheese burger. The burgers are not fancy American style, these are basic but are delicious nonetheless, are well made, and the packing is hygienic. The chicken surprise burger is also a good choice. We usually get fries too. For the prices they have, it's definitely worth it.
This place is inside the TDI mall
This place provides a large variety of items. There is also very cool types of drinks. You can visit here with your friends and family. I enjoyed this place
Thankyou
Local guide of level 7","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPif65VOJJ2dr-h2iVTJWJnlwgKzFU0wsnDJ6kE&fid=0x0:0x9627cc3b72a4e332"],"When":"2022-3-28"},{"Name":"Naveen Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWs7_zkHS3GF8ninNU_u_tzUkHbaJIB_12uXNNz069vnran8aIY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Delicious and exotic place for friends and family. The float icecream and there burger are too delicious. It is located inside the  TDI mall.this mall was also good for shoping and many more. Burger king's speciality is there combo burger pack of 69 and 79 . Survice are also too good. You can not forgot after coming.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMVqDbSJiNW7TRnIav1oLskPO_wCc7NRkZSmqT4&fid=0x0:0x9627cc3b72a4e332"],"When":"2019-7-25"},{"Name":"Shipra Wahi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX_ORu2-7q8BIfzoXM1eMm7ULRsFW-OLvP0v832r-LQCDJDa3t9=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pathetic exp had today. I ordered for Crispy Chicken Burger (49/-rs), French Fries (65/-rs) & Chicken Chilli Cheese Melt Burger (109/-rs) in night.

When the order came in, was surprised to see the packing. It was delivered in normal brown paper bag that everyone gets if visit outlet & both the burgers & french fries were also had same packing that gets in outlet.

So, all the three items was cold, french fries were soggy. The biggest shock when both the burgers was of same size, there was no difference.

While ordering I thought 'Chicken Chilli Cheese Melt Burger' will be big in size with good amount of cheese filling & other basic vegeies as per the high price, but it turned out be worst. There was no cheese at all, neither the tikki tasted like chicken chilli, no vegies at all. It was small in size, had put in 3 jalepenos & some tasteless sauce. (Check pic below)

Crispy Chicken burger costed low but still it was not even worth, as just had chicken tikki, with little amount of mayo with onion 3/4 slice not even full (Check pic below)

They also charged 29/-rs for delivery. In total had paid 293/-rs.

Wondering was I a fool who ordered from there, or they had me fool by sending such stuff.

I will never ever order again from any Burger King or neither will visit back.

It's really sick of entire Burger King team for charging high from customers & in the name of quantity they are serving peanuts.

Shame on you team. I am so upset by spening such amount for no worth at all.

If you want to charge high, than you should also start serving good amount of quantity.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMLsZecdo0SeUCJyNAxntUNAVSHu9TX1V_01Lk2&fid=0x0:0x9627cc3b72a4e332"],"When":"2017-2-11"},{"Name":"The Ultimate Foodie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcKhcw6tQR0RODBPDfNPZfhfh22AYS9UIRrN7G8ZsG3Wvo6Wf2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"as we're vegetarians, we love Burger king as we have a huge variety of options in the menue.. there is a huge variety of burger still we love the most popular aloo tikki burger... and always favourite one.....","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOWqWkLh9eIjvVAEsoS0dicot4A2QOcLkM-x-8B&fid=0x0:0x9627cc3b72a4e332"],"When":"2020-2-12"},{"Name":"Amrinder Kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXfg0TaPf4ImeMTBHW4bosl9Il08HlO9-hO1E4JChwj9-Y1_lgodA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very economical and tasty burger, nice place to go with family. [{"Name":"Vipul Bansal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI6bQnnd-hrmx2QNKz_JtNpa3tHEnwr3kXbHissXdPGp9QXsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This place is situated at first floor and it's little hard to find it though the maps are really helpful. This is not a very spacious place and if little crowded, you are bound to stand only. I tried veg Whopper and it was really good. At times you might find some guys selling some coupons and if your lucky enough you might get a good deal but that doesn't come everyday. All in all an average stay.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNGm9tm_mWk4ZiyLq08wvcfnIV6Luqr2eB_-MIv&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2017-5-22"},{"Name":"Md Neyazuddin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVoIzsv36SiV2nljTkBMlUW7gbDB8s_ClS65uu4BFIKnr07v1CeYQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Staff behaviour is nice. ..one of there staff viresh he is really nice always welcoming with beautiful smile  ...and no need to describe about burger king food its always awesome...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO-hupqimsrKm-FFeKTwxeF-RiDf6YHRvZ28v8H&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2022-4-8"},{"Name":"Dhruv Banyal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVclLaF-lvwnq6XnU3aawbIgrvvcg1x4-iBFNt7_oyvCNVSPCuD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Burger King has been on a rise and competing toe to toe to other joints. I love going here but can't be obsessed with their food. Their service can be slow at times but they do serve fresh food and it tastes good as well. Ideal place to be for every non veg or veg lover. You will find everything that you want to have.
It will get better with time. Have some seriously good offers to attract the crowd.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOSRqdI-MqajY69eNfaQRDr_8Mjwo9OyK3FhOCb&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2018-3-30"},{"Name":"Deepak Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU9L_RjaXj_ah0aqtQZmF8UFbHDWwqxFb4TcsAcEhhCBcO2Qf3Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I like Burger King because of 4 reasons.....

1. They have options for both vegetarians and non vegetarians.
2. They have many varieties of burgers in different flavors which are worth trying.
3. There chicken burgers are very tasty and chicken was well cooked and tendered.
4. The cost is very moderate and Pocket friendly.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPuSLEG3zxUcMj-xDJotO6S53Q7NRY4__tQrDGO&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2019-6-6"},{"Name":"khushi garg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUk69VTI6lRGwHW9BrJyCsuD68fXDVlfKTFcYSv7CiDCmpAKwtH=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Abysmal is the word that best describes my experience with this branch of Burger King at Pacific Mall, NSP. We ordered online at 9:52 and had to wait for more than an hour for the delivery. But guess what, the order never got delivered and none of the so called "helplines" were available. We had to visit the store offline and we noticed that our order was kept on the platform and none of store managers were concerned about it. SHAME","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Varun lall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX6nEGApBDdcSQwRB0L75s1kzAKWLW4s0PwWkC2PeXv1HqfXW44pg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outlet is really good , Good Sitting Available,. staff Is Also Nice , taste Is as always , Cheesy fries are not upto the Mark ( Not Recommended ) , Prices are Little High as earlier but worth it","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNqG3IIy0IYlO_XUlpB3JHkYvfH6BG0SjQyXx-Z&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2022-3-13"},{"Name":"Yashmi gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkO4vAQ3LAJOZ0bzaO1FKM4vgctBzxxA-IUnOSYOy_EiQ-VLFx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I saw the picture of crispy veg wrap today and was craving to have this, but when I had this, got disappointed with the taste. It was uncooked, unbaked wheat flour bread with a tikki inside, I only had that tikki, left that above part. Ice cream also did not fulfill expectations, it was mango ice- cream but it tasted something else. It was really disappointing to have such things in burger king. Could have been better.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOr07stRs6h59nun-ORjVe01oGTUHAT7FCTXGBi&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2019-5-23"},{"Name":"Manish Arora (foodieexplore)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdmkym9btcfrABtPnbX6xhAzGz_GlXZ0NoV8Epg6-WFDjzvaNf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The Burger King meals are best combos , tried Crispy Veg Burger Meal, and Classic Veg Burger Meal, the burgers were Amazing and had great patties. The Peri Peri Fries were also super tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipONAYtstBRHCEJSfsAdGzIrZBX7GkjEWK24L4lC&fid=0x0:0x3be0712b140f7407"],"When":"2021-3-15"}]

French fry patato is poor and rejected quality.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOjHeh1RhCR63AKBOcOGqRB3kd5P_fIX3YXsFCA&fid=0x0:0x84e48dce094e477"],"When":"2024-8-15"},{"Name":"Anshul Patro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUFHTJFlURRJMx3-GT6ZaZNe6U5BfWDb7nXcqDiDe10jn6BlxIrVg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice story good delivery speed. Overall a great experience. Loved the whoppers they are so heavy and juicy and yeah so heavenly. Sundaes are a good dessert to have here. Good sanity and hygiene maintained during Covid 19. Rice bowls are good too with a creamy texture overall. Shares a common dining area in the food court.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNv6PPGydS71KnZQQlgyvbKWg2aPWAiLSIvFT4L&fid=0x0:0x84e48dce094e477"],"When":"2020-8-15"},{"Name":"Sahil Chrungu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0lgjfmpgpXm-yKxo7STuMSd_-vs12suty5p12jXlyQEJqSP4m6A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"A famous Burger chain known for variety of options for Burgers, Fries and Shakes.

This one is located in Vegas Mall, Dwarka Sector 14 food court area. It's a self service restaurant, you need to wait for your order.

I had ordered a Double Crisp Burger meal and Peri Peri fries. I had gone on a Thursday and they were out of stock for Cold drink, i had to opt for Mango Shake, post that it took them about 14mins to give me my order (and this is when there was not that much rush at the restaurant).

Coming to the food now,

Peri peri fries, definately not going to order this again, nothing special about it, they give you a big with peri peri seasoning to mash it up and trust me its not worth the effort.

Double Crisp Burger, after having this first thought to my mind was that if this is Double crisp what will be the normal crisp burger. The crispness wasn't there, pretty much soggy from the edges (talking about the patty within).

All in all pretty average experience, not going to try it again !!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMC5gBL54SXxWqYqLgOrdbLEvhu9iI_p9-qzCJn&fid=0x0:0x84e48dce094e477"],"When":"2022-11-25"},{"Name":"Vaishnav Jayarajan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKworhqr8K7qNxm0xnc3RKDfhk09hW1MW-6NocWZ0w-3wHwbw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I recently visited the Burger King branch at Vegas City Mall and was quite disappointed with my experience.

I was looking forward to enjoying a choco dip ice cream, but when I approached the billing section, I was told I could only place my order through the app. Despite my reluctance to download it, the staff were unhelpful and refused to take my order.

This interaction felt quite rude, and it left me frustrated. Based on this experience, I have decided not to return to Burger King.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mik d","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVY5Dfxr1UgOTYYDIPtML9tFnSR3g5HlecpUe0rpJz5mlI2c36s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have visited your BK vegash mall on dated 14 sept 2024. And ordered few items and paid 688.80 through UPI and show my success transaction to your person. After few seconds, he has asked me to pay again payment. I have told him that I have already paid amount and why should I pay again. But your store person Suraj(Vegas mall delhi) asked me to pay again otherwise he will not serve my order. I have paid again but when I asked my bank about this transaction, they informed me that both the amount have successfully received by the shopkeeper(BK).

Is this a fraud committed by your shop? Why was the money taken from your shop twice, even though I had shown the successful transaction in front of him.

Pl. refund my money as soon as possible.

Email already sent on customercare@burgerking.in but no reply and response received from your side. Really bad service..

Should I lodge complaint on consumer court and cybercrime cell regarding it ?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sourav Dutta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVzv32Otnv0SdlFirnzJNkbFtPxdPbxePuBPqxnKSEujPlsv2Wc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"There is a mistake for the coustomer today one boy is purchase the water bottle for drinking to your shop in 25/5/2024 at 7:25 pm. The guy is not a local because he came to villages from another state in summer vacation to Delhi. Actually the price is high of water bottle. And the seal was not open. He go to return and say to money back because the rate is high. The manager said sorry there is no option. why I don't think so this rule in our India shop. May be the boy was not enough money to go home after check out to the mall. Pls respect the human being. If he don't want to take any seald type of material. You should be return the money back with material. Because they have the bill. That is shame on you. I asked to Manager R you drink that water in home or outside which rs70 of half litre. Don't miss use to your post which the given by your company. Be respect your coustomer. This will be happen with you & your family also. Pls change this Rule. Have A GOOD DAY.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"tashu tush","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXJ47uZe7sYnBcIguxq4jbTnW6W0LysPyvYWENf2WK6-VPK7xxL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We have ordered BK veggie 4 meals and that was not at all fresh there is no latus in the burger quality of buns and tikki was poor also in tacos the","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Singer Shally","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuDzhjoHLkOAMSZP0FJWOuoS9vndKIJ26y-kD-5e5RXlalew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I eat two crispy veg burgers 🍔 in vegas mall. The quality of food is very poor. I don’t expect with Burger King brand but I’m sure the burger is not fresh. My experience is pathetic. Yesterday, I saw the ad of my TV 📺 two burgers in 79 quality is not fresh 🤮 and why u asked to ur customers How much did u spend per person 🙂‍↔️","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Akash Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXk1hXM2PbWqhwPSFwjUbqK1JysvtgjSg3MlbbBxFa6ffbKL2b2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"It was just OK experience..Nothing special in the taste and the service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPkJqzHEve09_NMvDarGj9JLg8y55U6wr0d3qRw&fid=0x0:0x9d3a485d0325bf2e"],"When":"2024-11-24"},{"Name":"Sarita Chopra","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWwSn3mY4x96e2gEF9sTmNwYo-H2kbs8vd4j-jRfzDVgPMdSli4sQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Must give a try to their Hot n cheesy burger... Cold coffee is just okay.. as they put lots n lots of ice in it ... feels like slushy.. rest indie whooper is amazing too.
Atmosphere is great.. light music and courteous staff.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOoxJeSMqMqQrcl4wupA2hEwS-eONyk4XseIX6V&fid=0x0:0x9d3a485d0325bf2e"],"When":"2023-4-8"},{"Name":"Pradeep Anand","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJMMKLAC-0vH2C-f1ufR_ECdOap2lWmWn34igWGNahCNrg6GpJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I visited burger King at V3S mall with my family. Food was good but service was ok. The Place was very dirty and table was broken. I called someone to clean the table many times but  no one listen. I use to visit there many times but now this outlet is getting worst. Should improve the service. Showing some photos and videos below.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNlR_xVEFWLNcoi-An0MAXVoKmFnbuVWHzHtn93&fid=0x0:0x9d3a485d0325bf2e"],"When":"2023-7-7"},{"Name":"Shradha Agrawal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXbJ7W5HqNzu6gDwANqwyPKhXvHfXQ64Upxr_V1InKHs8pZ8gO7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Burger King is my favourite place to have burgers. I ordered the Paneer Overload Burger and the Whopper. Both the burgers tasted delicious. I also got peri-peri fries and Berry Blast shake. Everything was so good and I loved it. I took off a star because the place was so crowded. Had to wait some time to get seated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOEvSRqq4cjb2s4-4XqrEctFuMLL80ETz2-LVK3&fid=0x0:0x9d3a485d0325bf2e"],"When":"2022-4-3"},{"Name":"Sakshi Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5iP5TGZsymYpdxZATHyyn93MO5zJ0e2WuGx9CALC0UOV-7IJj=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is happy place for burger lover😍 I love thier burger alot .. this outlet is good for sitting area, Ambience. This outlet is inside the V3S mall which is near by nirman vihar metro station. i love to go this outlet because they have meal offers.. they serve good quality of food and fresh food.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOgacRbHoAzU1hSGJ7AdTEjPqyh7Tux9ru6KdCa&fid=0x0:0x9d3a485d0325bf2e"],"When":"2020-9-13"},{"Name":"Shanky Jaiswal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVpya7s7xjjb0-gOw2iSjiX-8XH0XfEIv6tMysxAsvDGcaJw2JI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I Visited This Place Few Days Back And I Ordered Their 2 Types Of Meal And Whopper. They Serve Burger, Fast Food, Desserts And Shake. This Place Is Located In V3s Mall, Ground Floor

Talking About Their Meal I Tried Their 2 Types Of Meal One With Cold Drink And Another One With Cold Coffee. In Their Meal It Had Burger Of Your Choice, French Fries And Cold Drink Of Your Choice. So Talking About Their Burger It Was Yummy And Tasty. I Give It To 5/5. Now Coming To Their French Fries. It Was Disgusting. They Put So Much Salt In The Fries. After That Coming To Their Cold Coffee, I Don't Like Strong Coffee So I Didn't Like It But If You Like Strong Coffee Than You Can Give It A Try. Atlast Talking About Their Whopper It Was Also Not So Good.

Overall I Didn't Like This Outlet Of Burger King. But If You Visit This Place So You Can Have Their Burgers Otherwise Not Good At All.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMOHfq8yy7Fa3LGmFloy_uuho7q5CR5OOlF7yCp&fid=0x0:0x9d3a485d0325bf2e"],"When":"2023-8-19"},{"Name":"Bharat Verma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXxLwaV9L0hwgvjqIUom-JzZQdHYZ383VkzMqP-SACF2uUhMQboJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We spotted more than 10 cockroaches just crawling on the walls and floors. No one cared. The food didn't taste good at all. There was a crazy lady (manager?) Shouting on the staff for one thing or another and totally killed the vibe.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ishika sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBPuvha1vzwJrj8KE3mKpfdanJYvpMNJYn21YwrCR_elUUC9r8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Very pathetic service. They took 45 mins to deliver a simple order with no rush or queues. Even after following up 2 times at the counter for order, the girl (server) named Riya stood with the tray of food and started assisting another customer as to how to order digitally so that their workers dont have to manually take orders. I went to follow up on the counter and found out she had my tray of food kept aside while she taught the cx how to order. As if this was not enough, she came with regular coke while i ordered coke float and only 1 burger instead of 2. Ordered 2 drinks but she only gave 1 straw. Asked for another one, she went back to get it and never came back. Could very clearly see cooks and servers joking around having fun while customers waited for their food. I would urge burger King to train their employees appropriately to handle customers. I am a regular at burger king coz i love the food. But this outlet at V3S mall had the most pathetic service delivered by the most incompetent server. This outlet needs to be assessed. No hate to burger king, just the outlet.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Manish Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVcGEA5gWionXNi43MSStHDCk7SXwgah3HB3ZiTEIAHzbu2CHxy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I ordered a Classic Cold Coffee with a Crispy Veg Burger, but instead received Coke, which spilled and soaked my burger completely. When I opened the package, I was surprised to find very little drink left in the container, and it was Coke instead of the coffee I ordered. This mix-up ruined my meal and was quite disappointing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMmPM7GraKPAdWvrxGTfcN69iUwTc1o0OcsaQ12&fid=0x0:0x5a0e6f0bd02be755"],"When":"2024-10-13"},{"Name":"K Nee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWg9uz5rU1UD2ToS7PqVn91xgYjTeplJj5_iz35OyP7dc9PylX=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely disappointed with the food they delivered me. I was so hungry so I ordered from Burger King. This was my 2nd time trying burger as I’m really not a burger person, first time was a week ago which my sister order Whooper Chicken jr , it was filling and really good so I ordered the same on Swiggy. To my utter dismay, it was burnt, lettuce & veggies were stalled. Do you keep your veggies in the fridge ? I contacted Swiggy but they told me to reach out to Burger King. The chicken wings were also very salty( it’s like licking salt) and unconsumable.
Please check the picture reference below.
I ordered from Anupam Saket outlet

Disclaimer: I’m not saying food should match picture but it’s not even close to your advertisement. It’s just 2 bun, 2 tomato, few slice of onion, stale lettuce , red mayo sauce, burnt chicken and close it","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMB0eLaC5_078caukDilkA6TaLtXj5IyPPNAIwX&fid=0x0:0x5a0e6f0bd02be755"],"When":"2024-12-13"},{"Name":"Shailesh kumar yadav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW0-xFgYRZDb2hZRygFngNzbnVv8grferFIH9lnINli8G9TvjUO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Starting with the staff they were polite and helpful. The atmosphere around was also good. We ordered two meals combo which came with cheesy fries and burgers they were good and warm both were veg burgers. Overall the taste was good.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"vivek sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1wY7PvODYP7xva_2E55YcYWIj65vywC7L4QY5UKaA_oMeREcawA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Their Cappuccino is ok ok not so tasty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPXhtXK98x2CPbBCxEDSoVwHMnaRM3PyeaWbiVo&fid=0x0:0x5a0e6f0bd02be755"],"When":"2024-12-10"},{"Name":"Tarun Bhatia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWTFNxb9XjsQOJTxq6bXNJMwy2cCI_FeGWhIyRxMQFrxhuGdrvjlg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Wounderful place to enjoy your evening with your family and friends. It is located in the pvr saket community center. I find this outlet very nice, with wonderful ambience.
Staff-5 stars - Staff here is fantastic, very polite & supportive. I am always ready to hear the feedback. I needed my order urgently to eat. The staff provided the order instantly, which was required.
Ambience-4 stars - This outlet is very neat & clean with a nice ambience overall.
Toilets-5 stars - I always find the toilets here very neat & clean. This is the main highlight of this outlet.
Food - 5 stars - I can eat the veg & non-veg Whooper burgers almost every time I come here. And now they have BK Cafe also where you can enjoy tea & coffee, even if they provide chocolate cakes for children.
Parking - 4 star - This outlet is inside the commercial community complex, so there is no issue of parking at all. Parking is paid per hour basis.
Outlet - 5 stars- I am giving full marks to them because of the experienced staff and also because of the sufficient sitting place with a sofa type sitting place.
Total paisa vasool ⭐️ 👌","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO1JR53lgdGQ_pi_Hg2x4r1RHLzqEGhRlkbNr2u&fid=0x0:0x5a0e6f0bd02be755"],"When":"2023-1-3"},{"Name":"Aaron Walker plays (Aaron_Walker_007)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVak_krVpZmlKM_XbnoIKFx8P3wYNnIHYSzVmF0VoWqJcdE1fjM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Burger King - Saket Community Centre

Located in Community Centre area near Anupam Cinema, another branch of my favourite burger chain exists here. Reliable, quality food, ambience & value for money.

I can always use a Whooper whenever hungry, it's my go-to burger.

This BK Outlet doubles up as BK Cafe, which serves various other beverages as well.

Chicken Whooper, Double Party Crispy Chicken are my favourite burgers & i order these at every BK outlet.
I needed my order initially, to eat at Resturant, then to pack & the staff didn't disappoint.

What i didn't like for this outlet was the cleanliness, the tables i checked were sticky.
Perhaps because it was closing time, so I'll ignore it.
But sitting was sufficient, with good sitting places & high chairs, comfy stools or sofa type sitting spaces!

Whenever in doubt, go eat non-veg burger at the King's ✌️
They really know their burgers!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP1nISe0SBHcBb7j7B6RGdi23kAUPAi9CMv5KBg&fid=0x0:0x5a0e6f0bd02be755"],"When":"2022-8-28"},{"Name":"Gopalan Rajamani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWyKDG2HtODiaR0BTCDR-5VNwOY0aIdnGS3eYoBeXTqebIoMGNc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I regularly go this place which is maintained well and decor is excellent.  I think this place is a hit with students because of its variety and affordability.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP7H0qadAOrSWz332AbEodXKrZZLKVS82iX0_wx&fid=0x0:0x5a0e6f0bd02be755"],"When":"2022-7-15"},{"Name":"Sheikh Fayik","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-usre80SbMwvt0cHg1WQ_DVm0FLh1uFUXgdflRhX8EbizAxSeWw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I dont know what wrong with the brand,due to the work going on in the cafe the AC service has been shut down while the food  is being served with sweat dripping from the hands of staff members.

[{"Name":"Mohit Gautam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWaGyHf5BpRF_fgKEI9ScvZ4uXDCBC9rWuVGEQNdS6AZQlcK8M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Burger King in Chhatarpur offers a great dining experience with genuine pricing and food quality that matches their usual standards. The burgers were fresh and delicious, and the overall taste was satisfying. It’s a self-service setup, which works fine as the staff is quick and efficient. A good option for a quick, budget-friendly bite!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP18uewfGEIl-tSvwkzs4zciCcYsaDNvI2kXmCA&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2024-12-25"},{"Name":"Shoaib Rafi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXR05JaxHYcrffEVG6_KulG4haiWVLWFqopMJKIVOWC7p_BwciI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently visited Burger King and had a satisfying experience. The service was quick, ensuring that I didn't have to wait long for my order. They offer a variety of combo options at a very reasonable price, making it a great value for money.

The restaurant was neat and clean, creating a pleasant dining environment. However, it's worth mentioning that the seating area is limited, so it might not be the best choice for large groups.

One of the convenient aspects of Burger King is its location within the Chattarpur Metro Station. This makes it easily accessible for commuters and adds to the overall convenience of dining there.

Overall, Burger King offers delicious burgers, crispy fries, and refreshing coke at a reasonable price. If you're looking for a quick and satisfying meal, this is definitely a place to consider."","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOwWQvW4wr-v_8ePUNDuFW1SYyiQCP1-sHt1fqB&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2023-5-17"},{"Name":"Pankaj Vaish","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUxIEKRNtHDXxWSxoTdeLnK18nGBJKku4QK6uy9pR0fpJI3swAn=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I recently dined at Burger King located in Chhattarpur metro, and I must say, it was an enjoyable experience. The restaurant's ambiance was clean and inviting, with a contemporary design that made it a comfortable place to sit and enjoy a meal.

One of the highlights of my visit was the food quality. The burger I ordered was delicious, with a perfectly grilled patty, fresh vegetables, and a tasty sauce that left me craving for more. The menu offered a variety of options to suit different tastes, from classic burgers to vegetarian choices, which was a plus.

The service was also noteworthy. The staff was friendly and attentive, ensuring that our orders were taken promptly and that we had everything we needed throughout our meal.

As for pricing, Burger King offered good value for money, especially considering the portion sizes and the quality of the ingredients used. It's a place where you can satisfy your burger cravings without breaking the bank.

Overall, my experience at Burger King in Chhattarpur metro was positive. It's a reliable choice for a quick and tasty meal, and I would definitely recommend it to anyone in the area looking for a satisfying burger fix.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO-Gk0znunsKf8JHbMjotv0mIoxxl2ORojV_ZRW&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2023-10-4"},{"Name":"Ashish Syal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-0QF8B0RIMHYjLGJ-O5REo4mEG1c90-Rvgl7zMeggHt936_Id=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can visited Burger King Chattarpur and had a satisfying experience. The service was quick, no long wait for my order. They offer a variety of combo options at a very reasonable price, making it a great value for money.

The best part is that Burger King is located within Chhatarpur Metro Station. This makes it easier for passengers to reach here and have their meal comfortably.

The restaurant was neat and clean. the seating area is limited, so not be the best choice for large groups.

Overall, Burger King offers delicious burgers, crispy fries, refreshing coke and cold coffee at a best price. If you're looking for a good and satisfying meal, you can definitely visit here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPrRcM3ovsih0JHCQ8WOPCb0IoUOdgVANK7wtsB&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2023-9-24"},{"Name":"Boris Thomas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKx2co7p7K86Z_AFil6UBcnnQ35bf7T7GympyY5eSHGgRWw7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We simply paused from the train on our way to the Hanuman Mandir and found this beautiful Burger King café, right in the heart of the train station, which is super convenient, very cheap and very fast service. Only problem is not a lot of us sitting home but we got lucky in the afternoon and had no troubles sitting down! Two other trendy eateries in the same space to add to the variety!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOeU-UcpwA1vlfPE9c9j-S7mOTuO3bO-9Hafz1y&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2023-11-10"},{"Name":"Shashank shekher","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXrQx3LO0bIG2PgVqJtBuLgGTAtnKyD29Hm0jlaB6XM0rwDmLrM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Good and fast service in the Burger king outlet, right on the metro exit gate in Chattarpur metro station.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMotted-3nzcmGZUF_ndEV-63NV8-Jv4Cm3vXCn&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2024-3-8"},{"Name":"nitin singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXF5T8aMAi33HQFVZgopXyspw0a7p4340Fdu1UGw7dhpGXU3_Y_fg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the outlets of a popular fast food chain Burger king. One can have different types of burgers and beverages.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNj3G3ZHC7P-MQJcZyLW7ONTGQQTzwrGkkVXZsl&fid=0x0:0xadf2e7d14639c94f"],"When":"2020-12-6"},{"Name":"Dr. Ritika Ragini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPFaTDkFuyjII6Thvc6T51yej9Gbtk1sykiftU0oA2IwmiBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"CHEATERS!!!! The location is highly convenient as it is accessible by all modes of public transport—metro, buses, auto-rickshaws, and even e-rickshaws, which drop you right at the doorstep. For those with personal vehicles, the parking arrangements are commendable.

The ambience is clean and inviting, making it a pleasant place to dine. The staff is incredibly friendly, and I would like to especially mention Alisha, who assisted us with our order. She was polite and helpful throughout, ensuring we had a seamless experience.

We ordered the Celebration for 2 Non-Veg Meal, which included:

2 Chicken Whoppers

2 Large Pepsi

2 Soft Serve Ice Creams

1 Cheese Loaded Fries

We also tried their Chicken Puff Pizza, which was a delightful addition. While McDonald's had introduced a vegetarian puff pizza earlier, Burger King has outdone them with this chicken version. Priced at just ₹99 for 2 puff pizzas, it's an absolute steal!

Given the chilly winter weather, Alisha suggested replacing the soft-serve ice creams in our meal with 10 Veg Sticks, which was a thoughtful recommendation that we happily accepted. Her hospitality truly enhanced our experience.

However, I noticed one issue that needs attention:
The management seems to have confusion regarding the serving sizes of drinks. The "large" Coke/Pepsi glasses they provide are misleadingly referred to as medium-sized by the staff internally, and yet, they are presented to customers as large. There seems to be a lack of clarity regarding the exact capacity (in ml) for small, medium, and large servings. I would strongly recommend proper training for managers and staff to address this and avoid spoiling the customer experience. Conducting a competitive analysis could also help improve this aspect.

Overall, this outlet is a fantastic place to hang out with family, friends, or loved ones...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNdOqtgUYUSs60ktUtlNUhImfDV5HEaKhxIJ8DZ&fid=0x0:0xb2587aa06c64696"],"When":"2025-1-5"},{"Name":"Hasan Khan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvVZ_hKBixzNsXNIHdNtWk0hexTUbvNvwsnmY83dMlSBNQAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Everything is good service , staff and food also ..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jyoti Kumari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCkblr-ixVW_VAPDFoPOLch9DHddKMSSZAVSLIw2Z0MB5ESA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good service 👍","Images":null,"When":""}]

I must appreciate the efforts being put by Mr. Goopinath and his whole team are extra ordinary (Chef,order person,packing person ,Mr Goopinath himself all whomsoever who working at that time) never felt like that anything was missing or disorganised. Even at 21:30 when the outlet was near to closing time all the staff were calm and composed and very helpful to all the the customer in any manner they could help.
Food served good .

I must say this is the Best Outlet of Burger King franchise or any other franchise i visited till date .

For the owner please preserve your Gems they are indeed very precious. I can say this because I have seen different franchise and restaurant fails to work so efficiently after being well set .Your outlet had maintained tremendous high standards for other .Keep it up guys great job .Keep working in same manner .","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gunjan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPJh5X8RaNO53aMojadKkLVWM13d6ODFj08sJQaf7-WSEp7n1d=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The food is like every other burger king outlet.

[{"Name":"Mirdul Kumar Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUHyPxlb4cUdzi6r7PylXwGJ1gh4hx4Ur5R_emUka2kqxf0XMVO=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"If you're looking for a satisfying meal without breaking the bank, Burger King's 300rs somthing combo meal is a solid choice. The meal offers a decent portion, typically including a burger, fries, and a soft drink.
The fact that it’s inside Rajiv Chowk Metro Station makes it super convenient, especially for travelers who don’t want to take an exit from the station. The sitting area is decent but can get quite busy during peak hours. You might need to do a bit of a struggle to find a seat, especially if you visit during rush times.
Overall, Burger King’s ₹300 meal delivers on taste and quantity, making it a great deal if you want a flavorful fast food experience on a budget. Highly recommended for a quick, satisfying meal!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipO_74dQzf2kWNTG_I3q33Jg_TvhcX0vzxCoNjo&fid=0x0:0x323c93d4fddbe609"],"When":"2024-10-13"},{"Name":"Gargi Varshney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLxKsF03Vwb0Qb1mvUWEiNkna_yW13v5_EJhyN5OZJkJ2k7cJDV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Every time I have visited Burger King faced the same problem. The staff there do not prepare orders placed through the app. I always have to remind them at the counter that I have placed an order. And when I go to remind them, they say this item is not available or that item is not available. What is this behavior? Shouldn't they check availability before accepting the order? Every time, I have had the worst experience. And as for the food, there's nothing special in the burger—just 2 slices of onion, one patty, and some sauce. That's it.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOT2taojslQ3QuF2-Qzo6Ccn2VHs-0kz5ZJsr58&fid=0x0:0x323c93d4fddbe609"],"When":"2024-12-27"},{"Name":"Rishi Rohilla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsIv8JCzO6WSyBHBPkhu3vzw0jjAX2N1wnM9-xpg3xqDzpg4MV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently got a combo from Burger King that included a burger, cold drink, ice cream, and French fries. The price was quite reasonable, and the taste of everything was really good. The burger was fresh and delicious, and the fries were crispy and well-seasoned. The cold drink was refreshing, and the ice cream was a perfect way to end the meal.

The atmosphere at the restaurant was very nice, with a clean and comfortable seating area. My order was ready quickly, without a long wait, which was great. The staff was polite and efficient, making the overall experience even better.

I really enjoyed this meal. Good food, a nice place, and fast service made it a great experience. If you're looking for a quick, tasty, and affordable meal, I definitely recommend trying this combo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNLKROy7zxov1CuYKxvAkAl0yhlPxGfj85bFTRq&fid=0x0:0x323c93d4fddbe609"],"When":"2024-8-15"},{"Name":"Rohit Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU-PiTRVg2UP4kInIrrNI6u7MONO-MwxY8Wxop_6c_7zOdzmTA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"While I generally enjoy Burger King for its excellent service in Germany, my recent experience at the Burger King in India was less satisfying. Despite paying taxes and high prices, the air conditioning was off, making the environment uncomfortably warm. Additionally, the burger I had was overly salty. Overall, I hope they can address these issues to improve the dining experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP6U4MjPXN047nOe1XTALxLpVK0ynSYw7711Ksx&fid=0x0:0x323c93d4fddbe609"],"When":"2024-8-15"},{"Name":"Vijender Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQDDCyv5HkN0jqk_vRgoH0q36ss6EtgPWcvZi8NE6rMoUtNsw-gA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Recently visited Burger King and, while the food was amazing as always, the service left something to be desired. They were only using one counter for taking orders, which resulted in a long queue and a frustrating wait. It took almost 15 minutes just to place an order. While the quality of the food didn't disappoint, the long waiting time due to limited service counters was a significant drawback.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMV2HtuITTVZyvKTXt6keQwS08cUNdaHRvmOJC2&fid=0x0:0x323c93d4fddbe609"],"When":"2024-8-11"},{"Name":"Kaushal Singh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXQ8qKKtS-R_w4Dgxx1KZmFn3HkkuABWg3nBi-93aoWN6pHnTl5DA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Service and food provided is good.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNQdqrI3w8pOmbzo8tX0Cy-_tbbNeLwwxKI5Wgx&fid=0x0:0x323c93d4fddbe609"],"When":"2024-12-20"},{"Name":"Jasleen Kaur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqM8NctsAEaX1O5mOU4TOOp66Tj58INZAfouhF1VGMKRmG6Ep0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Prices are reasonable.. burgers are yummy.. fries were not up to the mark.. as it is located centrally it's crowded","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kamaljeet Pasi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFIuf0JCCFa8Ndu5lwOORjURhPVTupq9tu_2mbNMP_OE_QSLPNwA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Your staff's behavior was very bad. Air Conditioning was not working at all I didn't complain as I didn't want to bother but one lady did complain but the staff replied it was already on and working.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNOnbaU5FCWUYcPrwZC0f0bNE1Gi2QiHJfRT0-1&fid=0x0:0xb093c34f64d28305"],"When":"2024-10-11"},{"Name":"Aditya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVVZri1ljNcUGLh8oHIZcN98VtS3meNzhW01fPjnODpR22AmYgE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Restaurant Review: Burger King, DT City Center

Overall Dining Experience:
I recently had an amazing and mouth-watering meal at Burger King in DT City Center. I opted for the Veg Whopper meal with a few side extras, and it was a delightful experience overall. However, the service was a bit slow, likely due to the high volume of orders at the time.

Atmosphere and Ambiance:
The atmosphere at Burger King was vibrant and welcoming. The decor is modern with a casual, fast-food vibe that makes it a comfortable place to dine. The restaurant was clean and well-maintained, which added to the pleasant dining experience.

Service:
While the staff were friendly and courteous, the service was slower than expected. It seemed like they were overwhelmed with the number of orders, which led to a longer wait time. Despite this, the staff remained professional and did their best to manage the rush.

Food Quality:
The Veg Whopper meal was delicious and lived up to its reputation. The burger was well-prepared, with fresh ingredients and a perfect balance of flavors. The side extras were equally tasty and complemented the meal nicely. The portion sizes were generous, ensuring good value for money.

Taste and Presentation:
The taste of the food was excellent. The Veg Whopper was juicy and flavorful, with a good mix of textures. The presentation was standard for a fast-food restaurant, but everything looked appetizing and was served hot.

Variety:
Burger King offers a wide variety of options, catering to different tastes and dietary preferences. The menu includes several vegetarian and vegan options, which is a big plus for those looking for meat-free meals.

Strengths:
- Delicious and well-prepared food
- Generous portion sizes
- Clean and welcoming atmosphere
- Friendly and professional staff

Weaknesses:
- Slow service during peak hours

Recommendation:
Despite the slow service, I would definitely recommend Burger King in DT City Center. The quality of the food and the overall dining experience make it worth a visit. Just be prepared for a bit of a wait if you go during busy times.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anushya Chetry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJxR_EfninLvG-u19IuMcOhGtyEhqNfd9Dzh05cCP16Ks2BWwe=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have always loved burger king until today. I never expected this service from them. I had ordered 3-4 items out of which one was missing that was BK chicken. I tried contacting the chat support however they were unable to help as they mentioned they need to validate from the restaurant and they were unreachable. I tried the same from my end hence, it went the same. I feel so disappointed. Seemed like I've paid for the food but however it just went wasted as its my loss. Zomato too couldn't help, poor service provided. Also burger king a humble request to provide the correct contact details if customers wants to reach you. Utterly disappointed!!!","Images":null,"When":""}]

I have always been a food enthusiast and dig into food as an when possible. I was introduced to Burger King in recent years when I read an advertisement of it being opened in TGIP.

Recalling the experience I ventured the place again to remind myself of the remarkable taste I had when I first stepped in to the Burger King joint.

Where:

Burger King is at the top floor of TGIP which is famously the food court. But unlike other joints Burger King has its own seating inside though the food can be enjoyed outside as well.

Why?

Now to answer that you will have to experience it on your own. If you want to taste something new to excite your taste buds or to relieve the melancholy of eating at McDonald's then this could be a good option.

Burgers:

We ordered two meals which had two Crispy Veg burgers, Potatoes fries (which we upgraded to plain cheesy Fries) and Chocolate shake(which was also upgraded from coke).

With two meals we ordered for another Burger in the name of Chilli Cheese Burger. And trust me it stands true to its name. It was actually quite chilly and I ended up drinking alot of water. Good for people who love spicy and chilli stuff.

What not to miss?

The fries with cheese famously called Cheesy Fries. Now this again comes in two flavors so you get to choose. I prefer plain cheese fries. Fries can be obtained separately as well so it's a must try.

Burger King has better and wider range of burgers- a special mention of their Whoppers  is highly recommend.

Two people can have sumptuous meal within Rs. 500 and I guess that makes it pretty affordable too. Burger King is indeed King in burger business and if you are new to it, it is worth a try.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOh-is7ibqAUbeCOU4oPn2sZNbmwaYKtYav5VJj&fid=0x0:0xe1a98e7131d40709"],"When":"2018-1-6"}]

[{"Name":"Sagar Joshi - (Guru ji)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtCgWh6E8GDTNP6PGu2KlY3xvn3VD6QtQvol1RtjGZ2g6KG4A6Og=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This burger king in The Great India Place is quite good as the staff are much polite than others I met with. And it is spacious. I loved the food at this place. Burgers are really amazing and also the ice-cream cone was fab. I loved to went there and have an amazing time with my friends. You must go and try food at this place.A quite good ambience at this outlet & my all-time favourite place to have some tasty & flavourful burgers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPrVaZKZuNr2ItJ978p8Kb1-l6s4ruAKHoxlvFZ&fid=0x0:0xb7c1c03a7d438afa"],"When":"2023-12-29"},{"Name":"vishal rana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVBEEwurQBc0t0AdSFSuQRmf_mw6AkFI5YDu2IuS4x7heQpmuQeTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The staff always trying to loot as much money as possible from customers by misguiding and doing fraud. I clearly mentioned that i need three chicken whopper jr. Meal but still the lady on the counter ordered something else. And when i asked them to change the order, they refused to do so. And what's the deal with always asking "single cheese or double cheese"? Are you giving it for free? Is no cheese not even an option, please stop misleading customers.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPO1qgKx7b-dNaq3guy3sODgED43ZMQcWS5GRWP&fid=0x0:0xb7c1c03a7d438afa"],"When":"2024-10-28"},{"Name":"Somnath Araya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVMxXpkH6Mxc54UNozVtrn-u2Gn0a_wkX1XPsIP70tGDyzKR7zu=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The bun of burger not fresh, and when i requested to change burger Miss Manju (worker of Burger King) she deny to change or replace, kindly don’t visit on Burger King!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipP39Zs1BCfVQIgQ_8KRTailhmY3qKVKOmo3BAtW&fid=0x0:0xb7c1c03a7d438afa"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Diksha Ganchaudhuri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL89PsV_5yR6bDieXi9CeG5PpCQ1bsJBd6Y5TPJajiRI6FE4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I have come to like burger king. This is for people with a subtle budget and has good veg and non veg burgers. Personally I would recommend a whopper and crispy veg or non veg based on your personal preference. The prices are sometimes disappointing though. It sometimes feels over priced but some items have a subtle pricing. Would want you to decide for yourself.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipN10pMbhBEIhNJUkHPurMFZtTByhH4T2iyYHBdm&fid=0x0:0xb7c1c03a7d438afa"],"When":"2023-8-13"},{"Name":"Swati Shukla","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrPeF9m-3ay0Z-SOkx1jCdep6uDneFrwB-CNToYvatwPfeK_IV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Pocket friendly | Good option for light meal

We had their burgers, wraps, fries and ice creams.
Burgers ~ Their burgers are good but they are not that exceptional. They put  Mayo and chipotle sauces in their burgers which sometimes ruin the taste of the burger as we only get mayo taste in every bite. Due to which I avoid their burgers because of extra sauces.
Wraps ~ Burger King wraps I tried for the first time both veg and non veg were Average. The crispy chicken wrap has only chicken patty and their sauces mayonnaise or chipotle.
Veg crispy wrap is a taco 🌮 filled with beans stuffing and same sauces which again ruins the main taste. Personally I don’t like that much of sauces as they over power the flavours.
Fries 🍟 ~ The fries are good their cheesy fries and salted fries is a good option to go for.
Ice creams & desserts ~ Burger King ice cream and desserts are really amazing do try them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNBi42zLhJEpTyUeX68bP3UTj87g0VzxYmiklAz&fid=0x0:0xb7c1c03a7d438afa"],"When":"2022-11-9"},{"Name":"SAIN NEWS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPPG3JzHbM4tBVqNO1lQ8lH5NAl9vHuizCGeRQQVmeT2ST0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The Ice latte was hot instead of cold as the ice cubes were added from the top. That's not a consumer expects as the drink was hot
Kindly look into it","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Asad Shakil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFCaVJ66IouOZ-IL6pHbK2uA4J86zxpodjE2RSgJVAEd_zLWvNbw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Staff is not good.....i order 12 burger and 12 soft cone icecream....they served me burger in the tray and there is no service available to serve icecream cone and they served directly in hand without serving tray.....and mostly icecream cone are broken they said that we have only these types of corn.....i think McDonald's service and food  is more more better than burger king","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sachin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAgRbw4uFDpTlmmT75RwFKBrd-bEWqNJrWHdFAlkaakAIAzWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They always have communications for offer like buy2@79 but when i ask about it, they always tell me this offer is expired. If offers is not going on then please remove the communication.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Orders took forever to come, I had to approach the counter for my order many times. My mutton whopper was the hottest that I have ever eaten at any Burger King. It was full of spicy sauce. When I told them that the preparation was bad and unlike any other Burger King, they told me that the recipe had changed. I ate at another BK just two weeks ago and I always order the same burger but that was fine. Fries were burnt and soggy - a feat only achieved by this outlet. Finally they were so noisy. There are literally 15-17 people in the tiny kitchen even as I write this and the place is just happy confusion. They need training and a proper audit. Never coming here again and if the recipe has really changed for the mutton whopper - well Bye Bye BK.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPdpVfqzHn5XQos56y1yq9wrwZg6-NaioDm6WPg&fid=0x0:0xabe506718aa80875"],"When":"2023-1-8"},{"Name":"Neha maylam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwlCMDX89_rnJGqXR7yDGeRoWgCAqzhVjSc-l60w_MItTsKA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Yesterday night I have ordered 2 order from BK app . Such a pathetic service and I had to pick that order personally from your store.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Shivam Tyagi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5mbpKyqqcBlNZmUk2GrnirMhmHNWlg074bJLjIWGz0XuAHCOJ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Owner of this franchise and Burger King’s higher management should perform an inspection here.
This branch is doing some very odd things-
They are either asking Zomato riders to cancel rides or making excuses like someone else picked the parcel.
They actually told me that some other rider has picked my parcel. I think they are not preparing food in night shifts which is why they are trying to make such excuses so that they don’t have to work.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with my recent experience while placing an order. This is not the first time I've encountered issues, but this time, it was particularly frustrating.

Every time I order from your outlet, items are accepted on the app, only to be informed 30 minutes later that they are out of stock and I should cancel the order. This delay not only wastes my time but also causes significant inconvenience, especially when I'm relying on your service for a meal.

Furthermore, when I called to inquire about the delivery status, I was met with unprofessional behavior from your staff. Rather than providing helpful information, they were dismissive and rude. This kind of treatment is unacceptable and does not align with the customer service standards I expect from a brand like Burger King.

I hope you will take immediate action to address these issues. If this is the level of service I can expect moving forward, I will be forced to reconsider my loyalty to Burger King.

I had an incredibly frustrating visit to Burger King. We waited 40 minutes for our food, which is already unacceptable for a fast-food restaurant. To make matters worse, the staff seemed completely disorganized and kept asking us to repeat our order—five times!

When we finally got our food, it was the wrong order entirely. By that point, we were too tired to even argue about it. The lack of coordination, efficiency, and basic customer service is shocking.

Definitely not coming back. If you're looking for fast and reliable service, this is not the place.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We visited on a muggy Saturday evening in August, and were pleased to find the inside of the restaurant cooler than the outside.

We got the Fiery Chicken burger meal, which consists of a delicious Chicken burger, fries and a soft drink. I’m not into soft drinks, but still went ahead and tried their meal. The fries were your usual fries, and the drink well, it was your usual soft drink. They’ve quite a few other burger options to choose from.

It’s located in Sector-74 shops, and is quite conspicuous. The staff tries their best. Thankfully, they’ve seating both on the ground floor and the first floor. I recommend you visit this Burger King location.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pankaj Saraswat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL9tm9B2xqU7CeCaE7NCAGWKlQbsX429qqhQGhgJ31XP6wqAXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I have ordered food via Swiggy late night from this outlet
